author: agent
summary: Comments and replies can carry solution=true; the panel Solutions filter treats the entire thread as a solution when either the root comment or any reply is marked.

author: agent
summary: Playwright coverage asserts four panel filters plus comment-level and reply-level solution marker flows.

author: agent
summary: Docker Compose is the primary v1 deployment path for MarkUS PocketBase, using a pinned community PocketBase image with mounted hooks, migrations, data volume, and optional Caddy proxy profile.

author: agent
summary: MarkUS service keeps direct PocketBase collection APIs closed to public users; browser visitor access is routed through /api/markus/v1 hooks for public-key and origin validation.

author: agent
summary: Live MarkUS client requests self-hosted PocketBase hooks under /api/markus/v1/reviews/:reviewId and sends top-level pageKey/pageUrl/annotationType/geometry fields.

author: agent
summary: PocketBase hook exports explicit public MarkUS fields and sorts JSVM findRecordsByFilter calls by id because PocketBase 0.39 rejects created as a sort field here.

author: agent
summary: Live-mode browser tests should assert the PocketBase hook contract: /api/markus/v1 routes, pageKey query strings, threads responses, and top-level create payloads.
